name: vssh
description: Termius-alternative SSH client with encrypted credential vault and automatic password-prompt detection
author: Srinivas Mannem

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json -w" "esbuild src/preload/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist/preload/preload.js --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/index.js dist/preload/preload.js && electron ."
scripts.build:main: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-schema.js
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
